recommendations.title: The Crow: Salvation
recommendations.overview: Alex Corvis, a man wrongly executed for the murder of his girlfriend, returns from the dead and sets out to find the real killer.

recommendations.title: The Amateur
recommendations.overview: After his life is turned upside down when his wife is killed in a London terrorist attack, a brilliant but introverted CIA decoder takes matters into his own hands when his supervisors refuse to take action.

recommendations.title: Tarzan and His Mate
recommendations.overview: Harry Holt returns to Africa with his friend Martin Arlington to head up a large ivory expedition.
